sustainability_recommendations.overall: Good sustainability with Logistic_Regression, but room for improvement

insights: Top risk factors: DiabetesPedigreeFunction, Insulin, BloodPressure
SHAP analysis shows non-linear relationships between features and diabetes risk
Individual predictions vary significantly based on feature combinations

sample_risk_assessment.description: High probability of diabetes. Medical consultation recommended.

recommendations: Eliminate refined sugars and processed foods
Limit carbohydrate intake to 45-60g per meal
Start with 10-15 minute walks, 3 times daily
Progress to 150 minutes moderate exercise weekly
Monitor blood glucose before and after exercise
Quit smoking and limit alcohol completely
Stay hydrated with 8-10 glasses water daily
Immediate consultation with primary care physician

success_metrics: Blood glucose levels within target range
personalized_insights: Your glucose level is within normal range
Your weight is in a healthy range
